mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HOLIDAYS WHERE HOLIDAY_YEAR = #{year}
SELECT TO_CHAR(LOCDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS locdate, DATE_NAME AS date_name, IS_HOLIDAY AS is_holiday FROM HOLIDAYS WHERE HOLIDAY_YEAR = #{year} ORDER BY LOCDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOLIDAYS(HOLIDAY_SEQ, HOLIDAY_YEAR, LOCDATE, DATE_NAME, IS_HOLIDAY) VALUES ( HOLIDAY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{year}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{locdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{date_name}, #{is_holiday, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
